description:
Legal document or possibly a letter. In Hebrew. Dating: late, ca. 16th–18th century. Mentions Shemuʾel Pali[...] (שמואל פאלי....); "the polisa, that is to say the acknowledgment, from that which is owed to me [...] in Alexandria" (הפוליסה ר״ל ההודאה ממה שיש לי . . . .באסכנדיריאה); a claim that someone made (טענה שטען . . . . ); and the consul (קונשול) (penultimate line of recto and second line of verso). 

Note that the image for the recto is on the left side of Archive GN 2111/30 and the image for the verso is on the right side of Archive GN 2111/31.
